item.title: DIL & Grandson Were Keeping a Twisted Secret
item.description: The burned remains of 65-year-old Marilyn Gandert were found in a remote part of Sandoval County last January. Gandert’s daughter-in-law and grandson wer accused of murdering the woman and hiding evidence. What do you think pushes people to even consider hurting their loved ones?

media:content.media:title: DIL & Grandson Were Keeping a Twisted Secret
media:content.media:description: The burned remains of 65-year-old Marilyn Gandert were found in a remote part of Sandoval County last January. Gandert’s daughter-in-law and grandson wer accused of murdering the woman and hiding evidence. What do you think pushes people to even consider hurting their loved ones?

item.title: He Deliberately Broke Her SPINE
item.description: In May 2022, 27-year-old Travis Ray Thompson was caring for his ex-girlfriend’s two-year-old daughter, Jacklyn Schwingel, when he called to say something was wrong. Minutes later, Jacklyn was found unresponsive — her spine severed and body showing signs of brutal force. As we examine how anger, control, and heartbreak turned deadly, I'd like to hear you guys' opinions on this absolutely heartbreaking case.

media:content.media:title: He Deliberately Broke Her SPINE
media:content.media:description: In May 2022, 27-year-old Travis Ray Thompson was caring for his ex-girlfriend’s two-year-old daughter, Jacklyn Schwingel, when he called to say something was wrong. Minutes later, Jacklyn was found unresponsive — her spine severed and body showing signs of brutal force. As we examine how anger, control, and heartbreak turned deadly, I'd like to hear you guys' opinions on this absolutely heartbreaking case.

item.title: Little Lilly's Last Moments Were Horrifying
item.description: Lilly Hanrahan's case is absolutely heartbreaking and horrifying. Still, one question remains: Is it possible for her legal guardian to not notice these sustained injuries in the previous days?? What do you guys think?

media:content.media:title: Little Lilly's Last Moments Were Horrifying
media:content.media:description: Lilly Hanrahan's case is absolutely heartbreaking and horrifying. Still, one question remains: Is it possible for her legal guardian to not notice these sustained injuries in the previous days?? What do you guys think?

item.title: She Found Herself Amidst Chaos!
item.description: This case is the definition of wrong place, wrong time. Tatyanna was a beautiful soul who became a victim in this case... My heart aches for her family and I cannot imagine the pain and suffering this violent crime has caused them. What do you guys think of this absolutely tragic case? - Em x

media:content.media:title: She Found Herself Amidst Chaos!
media:content.media:description: This case is the definition of wrong place, wrong time. Tatyanna was a beautiful soul who became a victim in this case... My heart aches for her family and I cannot imagine the pain and suffering this violent crime has caused them. What do you guys think of this absolutely tragic case? - Em x

item.title: They Starved Their Own Child!
item.description: What really breaks your heart about Jacqueline’s story is how it shatters the illusion that childhood automatically means safety. She should have been able to enjoy her life without fear — school, friends, family, routines. Instead, someone exploited vulnerability in the most unforgivable way. When you think about Jacqueline’s case, what affects you most — how young she was, the breach of safety every child deserves, or the way the community was shaken by something so unthinkable? - Em x

media:content.media:title: They Starved Their Own Child!
media:content.media:description: What really breaks your heart about Jacqueline’s story is how it shatters the illusion that childhood automatically means safety. She should have been able to enjoy her life without fear — school, friends, family, routines. Instead, someone exploited vulnerability in the most unforgivable way. When you think about Jacqueline’s case, what affects you most — how young she was, the breach of safety every child deserves, or the way the community was shaken by something so unthinkable? - Em x
